product: Schedule data refreshes in Google Sheets (Public Preview)
tagline: You can now schedule automatic data refreshes in the Databricks Connector for Google Sheets on an hourly, daily, or weekly basis.
what_it_does: You can now schedule automatic data refreshes in the Databricks Connector for Google Sheets on an hourly, daily, or weekly basis. This page describes how to schedule automatic data refreshes in the Databricks Connector for Google Sheets to keep your imported data up to date. Scheduled refreshes run your saved queries on a recurring basis and update the corresponding sheets.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

key_takeaway: You can now schedule automatic data refreshes in the Databricks Connector for Google Sheets on an hourly, daily, or weekly basis.
